questions.stem: Which investment evaluation technique selects the project with the highest value?
questions.explanation: Net Present Value selects the project with the highest positive value.

questions.stem: If a project has a negative NPV what should be done?
questions.explanation: Negative NPV means the project returns less value than it costs.

questions.stem: Which financial metric measures the percentage return relative to investment?
questions.explanation: Return on Investment measures profitability relative to investment.

questions.stem: Which metric represents the discount rate that makes NPV equal zero?
questions.explanation: Internal Rate of Return represents the break even interest rate of the investment.

questions.stem: Which project should be selected if comparing several options?
questions.explanation: The project with the highest NPV delivers the most financial value.
